inputs.description: Create scripts/enrichment/wikipedia_client.py — async Wikipedia/MediaWiki API client using httpx. Follow the pattern from scripts/enrichment/wikidata_client.py. Functions: resolve_titles_batch(qids) using Wikidata wbgetentities API, fetch_links_batch(titles) using MediaWiki prop=links|categories (50 per request), fetch_summary(title) using REST API /page/summary. Filter broad categories with regex. Create tests/scripts/enrichment/test_wikipedia_client.py with mocked httpx. TDD. Commit.
